# doc-preprocess-hub

> Enterprise document preprocessing platform — MinerU + docling with audit trails, PII redaction, and operator console.

## What is doc-preprocess-hub?

A production-ready document preprocessing pipeline that combines MinerU and docling for document parsing, with built-in PII redaction (Presidio), audit trails, and an Ant Design Pro operator console.

## Key Features

- Dual parser engine: MinerU + docling
- PII redaction via Microsoft Presidio
- Full audit trail for compliance
- Ant Design Pro operator console
- FastAPI backend with Celery task queue
- OCR support for scanned documents
- RAG-ready output formats

## Tech Stack

FastAPI, Celery, MinerU, docling, Presidio, Ant Design Pro, React

## Use Cases

- Enterprise document ingestion for RAG pipelines
- Compliance-ready document processing with PII handling
- Batch document conversion with operator oversight

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/MackDing/doc-preprocess-hub
- Author: https://github.com/MackDing
- OPC Hub: https://opc.ren
